entities.name: RICE
entities.description: Staple food crop of India grown on 44 Mha

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: Country where rice is grown and drought analysis is conducted

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: An inevitable phenomenon affecting rice production and causing area reduction

entities.name: NDVI
entities.description: Normalized Difference Vegetation Index used to assess drought damage and map affected areas

entities.name: MODIS
entities.description: Moderate Resolution Imaging Spectroradiometer used to derive NDVI data

entities.name: DROUGHT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of rice varieties to withstand drought conditions

entities.name: TRMM
entities.description: Tropical Rainfall Monitoring Mission used to provide rainfall data for drought analysis

entities.name: SPECTRAL MATCHING TECHNIQUES
entities.description: Techniques used to categorize drought-affected rice areas into severe, moderate, and mild classes

entities.name: FIELD SAMPLING
entities.description: Process of collecting ground survey samples to assess damage intensity and generate spectral signatures

entities.name: SPECTRAL SIGNATURES
entities.description: Data generated from ground survey samples used for spectral matching

entities.name: HARVESTED RICE AREA
entities.description: The actual area of rice harvested, used as a benchmark for drought impact

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESS
entities.description: General category of environmental stress that includes drought

relationships.description: used to estimate and compare with
